name: Hindol
description: Joyous and playful; personified as Lord Krishna on a swing (hindola).

children.name: Basanti
children.description: A radiant woman plucking spring blossoms to offer to the gods.

musicalMutation.description: Raises the 4th note to create a sharp, bright springtime feeling.
Plays strictly in the upper register.

children.name: Sindhoori
children.description: Lovers playfully throwing vibrant red powder (sindoor) during the Holi festival.

children.name: Telangi
children.description: A woman applying cooling sandalwood paste to her body in the warming spring air.

children.name: Devkari
children.description: A devoted woman offering prayers at a forest shrine.

children.name: Aheeri
children.description: A cowherd girl waiting for Krishna by the riverbank.
